name: Buffalo Chicken Wings w/ Blue Cheese Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 18 Chicken wings, drumsticks removed, tips discarded
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat. Add hot pepper sauce to taste.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan or deep-fat fryer to 375°F (190°C). Fry wings in batches, ensuring they do not crowd the pan, until golden brown and cooked through, about 12 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
3. Brush wings with spicy butter mixture and serve warm with Blue Cheese dipping sauce.
BLUE CHEESE DIPPING SAUCE
In a small bowl, mash blue cheese to leave some lumps. Whisk in mayonnaise until combined. Add the remaining ingredients and whisk until well blended. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
